pundit.name: Eric Wynalda
pundit.take: **Frankly, if I were as clueless as these managers, I'd hang up my boots.** Look, Germany's demolition of Curacao was child's play, but it vaults "The Noisemaker" Rafe to the top of the standings as if he's the second coming of Rinus Michels. It's almost laughable that this 15-year-old chaos merchant is outperforming everyone; it looks like Zach, a.k.a. "Mustard Boy," might have thought he was selecting teams from FIFA video games rather than doing actual research. I mean, Saudi Arabia? Seriously? Did you even try? Devin, or "Ghost Pepper," stands as the only competent one in this mess, holding firm with a well-rounded squad. As for "Bubba G" Gunner and his baffling picks—I'm just as confused as when I had to explain the offside rule to a referee. And let's not even get started on "The Backpass Assassin" Gayden, who seems to have drafted like he plans on parking the bus every game. This is a joke — a few of these managers should be worried more about booking a flight home than lifting a trophy.

pundit_takes.headline: Spain set to dominate Cape Verde as Devin plans victory dance
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ghost Pepper confident as he relies on Spain's top-tier strength.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G's Egypt poised for upset against Belgium
pundit_takes.subtitle: "If anyone can do it, it's got to be someone," says Gunner.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy hopes for miracle as Saudi Arabia faces Uruguay
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach's strategy: pray and hope for the best, plan C remains balsamic.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe's Germany victory raises questions about experienced managers' competence
pundit_takes.subtitle: Noisemaker leads pool with zero soccer knowledge, sets new benchmark.

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe's youth revolt: 15 years old, and now he's top of the leaderboard.
Rafe's Tier-3 teams outscoring Tier-1? Gayden's son drafted chaos and it worked.
Devin, stop losing to Rafe; kid already owns you with a 6-point gap.
Gunner was the favorite until Rafe gate-crashed; model can't predict teenage chaos.
